title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) to Build Hunter & Herder Supercomputers
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) partners with the University of Stuttgart to build two supercomputers, named Hunter and Herder, for the latter's High-Performance Computing Center.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch From the Prospering Technology Solutions Industry
text: Industry players like IBM HPE, AGYS and PAR are gaining from the increased demand for integrated solutions and the growing adoption of the multi-cloud model, despite persistent supply chain constraints.

title: University of Stuttgart and Hewlett Packard Enterprise to Build Exascale Supercomputer
text: STUTTGART, Germany--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The University of Stuttgart and Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) have announced an agreement to build two new supercomputers at the High-Performance Computing Center of the University of Stuttgart (HLRS). In the first stage, a transitional supercomputer, called Hunter, will begin operation in 2025. This will be followed in 2027 with the installation of Herder, an exascale system that will provide a significant expansion of Germany's high-performance co.

title: HPE names Marie Myers as chief financial officer
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. HPE, -1.55% on Friday named Marie Myers as executive vice president and chief financial officer, effective Jan. 15, 2024. Myers will report to HPE Chief Executive Antonio Neri.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise appoints Marie Myers as Chief Financial Officer
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that Marie Myers will join the company as executive vice president and chief financial officer on January 15, 2024, reporting to Antonio Neri, president and chief executive officer. Myers has served as CFO of HP Inc. (NYSE: HPQ) since 2021, having spent more than 20 years in numerous financial leadership positions at the company. She is based in Houston.
